description_for_human: Make an MCP server for any use case with no server — content-addressed, verify-before-exec.
description_for_model: A spec + template for building static MCP servers. The repo is the catalog; tools bind to content-addressed compute cells verified by sha8 before execution. Read SPEC.md, scaffold with new-mcp.mjs, build with build.mjs, serve with the generic shim.mjs.
